title: Bartender / Bar Attendant / Pool Attendant / Cocktail Server
company: Caesar's Republic- High Dive Pool & Lounge
location: PEEK nighclub (inside Harrah's) at Stateline, NV
description:
As part of the opening team for a brand-new luxury poolside experience, delivered exceptional guest service in a fast-paced, high-energy environment. Provided full-spectrum support across bar operations and poolside service, ensuring a seamless and elevated guest experience.

Key responsibilities included:

Crafted and served premium cocktails, beer, and wine while maintaining accuracy, speed, and presentation standards
Provided attentive poolside and lounge service, taking orders, delivering beverages, and anticipating guest needs
Maintained clean, organized bar and pool areas, adhering to health, safety, and brand standards
Supported bar setup, inventory control, and restocking to ensure continuous service flow
Engaged with guests to create a vibrant, welcoming atmosphere aligned with the High Dive brand experience
Collaborated with team members to execute high-volume service during peak periods, events, and activations
Monitored pool deck environment to ensure guest comfort, safety, and overall satisfaction
Recognized for adaptability, strong guest engagement, and contributing to the successful launch of a new hospitality concept.
application_instructions: Drop off resume in person at Harrah's

title: Plant Nursery Worker
description: Seasonal part-time summer position until Oct 1. We are looking for a plant waterer for a few hours a day mainly Tues-Thurs. May turn into more depending on experience with retail. This job may require heavy lifting, friendly customer service, retail experience. You will be moving, loading and watering plants, trees, etc. Must live locally.

title: Multi-Purpose Clerk - Deli
description: The Multi-Purpose Clerk may be assigned to one of several departments within the store – to include Center Store Market, Fresh Market Departments, or Guest Services Department.  The Multi-Purpose Clerk is responsible for promoting sales within assigned department, answering our guests’ questions, responding to guest requests for products, and accurately placing special orders. The Multi-Purpose Clerk practices safe food handling procedures, maintaining clean work area, orderly and free from safety hazards. The Clerk receives, inspects, and logs products for accuracy of shipment and quality as well as stocks, rotates, and merchandises product to maintain freshness and department appeal.

title: Housekeeping Room Attendant
description:
*This is a seasonal position that will start on June 1, 2026, and end on September 30, 2026.

Are you detail-oriented and take pride in creating clean and inviting spaces? Join our vibrant hotel or resort as a Room Attendant and play a vital role in ensuring our guests enjoy a comfortable and memorable stay. With high energy and enthusiasm, you will be responsible for maintaining the cleanliness and tidiness of guest rooms, leaving a lasting impression on our guests. From making beds to replenishing amenities, you will contribute to the overall guest satisfaction and contribute to the positive reputation of our establishment. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, have an eye for cleanliness, and take satisfaction in providing exceptional service, this is the perfect opportunity to showcase your skills and become an integral part of our dedicated housekeeping team.

title: Front Desk Agent
description:
*This is a seasonal position that will start on June 1, 2026, and end on September 30, 2026. 

Are you a friendly and outgoing individual with a passion for creating memorable guest experiences? Join our team as a Front Desk Agent and be the welcoming face of our establishment. As a Front Desk Agent, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring our guests feel valued and cared for from the moment they arrive.

title: Cage Cashier and Caesars Rewards Representative
description: This position is responsible for meeting casino and patron cash needs and promoting the company’s customer loyalty program.

title: Host/Cashier
description: Welcomes and seats guests and receives and records payment of restaurant guest checks.

title: Cook II
description:
Responsibilities:

Prepare and cook all items according to company standards for recipes and procedures, including the seasoning, finish and garnishment of all food items and entrees. Adheres to time and sequence of cooking operations to meet service standards/hours.
Performs all basic cooking operations including deep fat frying, broiling, steaming, sautéing, basic oven work and production/prep work. Plate up food items and dish up for large functions. Effectively use kitchen tools and utensils including knives, slicers, choppers, mixers, steamers and braziers.
Work assigned station in the kitchen, with responsibility for the cleanliness and sanitation of assigned work area.
Assist other kitchen personnel as needed.
Properly use and store food items and kitchen supplies.
Complete prep work for next shift.
Transport food and supplies to workstations as needed.
Maintain cleanliness and organization in the coolers and dry storage areas.
Provides guidance to peer group employees to oversee task completion.
Maintains regular attendance for scheduled work.
Must follow Bally’s Values and Purpose model at all times.
Perform other duties as assigned.

title: Bus Person
description:
Responsibilities:

Keep side stations stocked.
Assist Food Servers as necessary.
Help control waste and breakage by handling service ware with caution; loading and unloading bus tubs with care; avoiding discarding reusable items.
Assists in keeping restaurant neat and clean.
Wipes down chairs, tables, child seats, and picks up floors around each table bussed.
Observes good sanitation and safety procedures.
Adheres to the Thoughtful Service Model at all times.
Other duties as assigned.

title: Administrative Assistant
description:
The City of South Lake Tahoe is recruiting for a Temporary Administrative Assistant to provide short-term support within the Human Resources Division. This position performs a variety of general administrative, clerical, and customer service duties in support of day-to-day HR operations. Review of applications will begin immediately and continue until the position is filled. Candidates selected for further consideration will be contacted for an interview.



Under the direction of the HR Manager, the Temporary Administrative Assistant will assist with tasks such as document preparation, recordkeeping, scheduling, data entry, file maintenance, and other general office support duties as assigned. This role is intended to help maintain efficient department operations and provide administrative assistance across a range of HR functions.

title: Overnight Grocery Team Member (Stocker, Inventory, Receiving)
description: Provides overnight support for assigned team to include receiving and preparing product and maintaining the floor, displays, and back stock in accordance with company standards. All Whole Foods Market Retail jobs require ensuring a positive company image by providing courteous, friendly, and efficient service to customers and Team Members at all times. All positions must be performed in accordance with team and store Standard Operating Procedures. Further, Team Members must be prepared and able to perform the duties inherent in other Team Member job descriptions. All positions must strive to support WFM core values and goals, promote national, regional, and store programs and initiatives, and ensure adherence to all applicable health and safety regulations including Food Safety and regulatory duties required in the department.

title: Specialty Team Member (Beer, Wine, Cheese & Chocolate)
description: Provides support as a member of the Specialty team to include receiving and preparing product, maintaining the Specialty floor and displays, and selling product in support of the regional Specialty vision. All Whole Foods Market Retail jobs require ensuring a positive company image by providing courteous, friendly, and efficient service to customers and Team Members at all times. All positions must be performed in accordance with team and store Standard Operating Procedures. Further, Team Members must be prepared and able to perform the duties inherent in other Team Member job descriptions. All positions must strive to support WFM core values and goals, promote national, regional, and store programs and initiatives, and ensure adherence to all applicable health and safety regulations including Food Safety and regulatory duties required in the department.

title: Dishwasher
description:
South Lake Brewing Company is seeking a dedicated Dishwasher to join our team at The Libation Lodge,
located in the Tahoe Village Center at 4000 Lake Tahoe Blvd, Ste. 26, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150 -
across the street from the Heavenly Village.
This is an entry level position, no prior experience is required. Dishwashers will report to the Kitchen
Manager of the Libation Lodge and may receive some daily instruction from the Line Cooks and
Managers. This is a full-time position with starting pay of $17-18/hour. This position participates in our
tip pool and receives tips on a weekly to bi-weekly basis.

title: Restaurant Line Cook
description:
South Lake Brewing Company is looking to hire a Line Cook to help operate our small kitchen and
prepare food for customers at our brewpub, the Libation Lodge, located in the Tahoe Village Center.
The primary responsibility of this position is to prepare and cook food and meals for our customers at
the Libation Lodge under the direction of the head chef and/or Lead Line Cooks. Our kitchen is roughly
300 square feet in size and the food menu consists of elevated pub fare. We serve large portion
shareables/appetizers, hot sandwiches and burgers, a mixture of healthy and fried sides, and desserts.
The persons applying for this position must have at least 6 months of experience cooking professionally
in a commercial kitchen as a line cook, restaurant cook, or prep cook. Formal culinary education is a plus
but not required. The ideal candidate is organized, reliable, and passionate about delivering exceptional
food experiences to our guests. Persons applying for this position must be able to speak, read, and write
in the English language. If offered a position, applicants must show proof of current Food Handler’s
Certificate in California or obtain one within 2 weeks of employment at SLBC.

title: Cashier / Sales Associate
description:
Must enjoy working with the public, possess a positive attitude, be enthusiastic and interact well with customers.

Previous cashiering experience is a plus. Knowledge of retail computer systems preferred, however, will train. Ability to provide excellent Customer Service and be a Team Player.

Excellent communication and organizational skills, high attention to detail and must be able to multi task.

Ability to have a flexible work schedule that may include holidays. Weekends required.

title: Box Office Attendant
description: The Box Office Attendant responsible for ticket sales and customer service for all ticketed events at the Tahoe Blue Event Center. While delivering exceptional customer service to patrons. This role requires a strong understanding of the Ticketmaster system, event details, and venue seating configurations to assist guests with ticket purchases and inquiries. The attendant processes transactions, handles cash and credit payments with accuracy, and ensures proper distribution of tickets and change. Additionally, the position involves responding to phone inquiries, maintaining confidentiality of financial and customer information, and reconciling daily ticket sales.

title: Banquet - Set up
description: Banquet Set-Up personnel are responsible for arranging meeting rooms in the Convention Center to accommodate scheduled convention groups. Included in this task is the set-up and dismantling of dance floors, tables, chairs, platforms and displays as specified by the Banquet Manager or the Sales prospectus.

title: Host Person
description: The Host Person is responsible for coordinating the proper rotational seating of guests to support smooth dining operations.

title: Food Truck Assistant
description:
The Food Truck Assistant supports the Food Truck and Events Lead in operating the Food Truck at our
Brewery location. This role focuses on food preparation, event support, transportation of supplies,
maintaining high standards of food safety and cleanliness and providing customer service. The ideal
candidate is organized, reliable, and passionate about delivering exceptional food experiences to our
guests. This is an hourly position at $18-20 an hour with the opportunity to earn additional income
through tips.

title: Barista
description: We believe in creating a warm and welcoming space where every cup of coffee sparks connection. Every shift is a chance to brighten someone’s day. Whether it’s a warm smile or remembering a favorite order, you create moments that matter.  If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, love engaging with people, and take pride in your work, we’d love to have you on our team.

title: Lead Barista
description: The position supports store success by consistently delivering an exceptional service experience and exceeding established standards during every shift. This role partners with the Assistant Manager to support daily operations, ensure high-quality store performance, drive financial results, and assist in supervising, coaching, and developing team members.

title: Cedar Bath Attendant and Laborer
description:
Overview
Bath Attendant: Opportunity to learn a role as a bath attendant assisting customers as a Cedar Bath Guide. Tips included. (Female only)

The Employee shall perform a variety of duties related to manual labor and maintenance tasks, as responsibilities reasonably associated with their position. The duties of the employee include, but are not limited to, the following:

Responsibilities
Cedar Bath Maintenance: The Employee will ensure proper maintenance of the cedar baths, which consists of manually pushing a 40 pound agitation machine. This task is integral to the day-to-day upkeep of the baths and must be performed with care and consistency.

Cleaning and Laundry: The employee will be responsible for maintaining cleanliness in designated areas and handling laundry services as assigned.

Material Handling: The employee will manage the pick up and delivery of materials as needed for business operations, ensuring that items are handled efficiently and safely.
This position offers an opportunity for growth within a supportive environment where your skills can be utilized effectively while contributing to the success of our operations.
application_instructions: Email Tim with your interest or resume at tahoeforestbaths@gmail.com

title: Evening Gate Attendant
description:
SUMMARY
We are actively seeking dynamic and reliable individual to join our team. The Gate Attendant supports operations and events by providing excellent communication and customer service while metering the flow of traffic through the gate on Valhalla Road.

Responsibilities:
1. Gate Shifts: Be available to work gate shifts, opening, and closing the entrance for patrons and guests. Validate gate entries are related to the event venue and direct non-event guests to other designated areas. Maintain a professional and approachable attitude while assisting guests during gate shifts.

Minimum Requirements:
1. Customer Service Skills: Excellent interpersonal and communication skills to interact positively with clients, patrons, and guests. Ability to handle customer inquiries and concerns professionally and with a problem-solving mindset.
2. Attention to Detail: Precise and meticulous approach to event setup to ensure everything is arranged accurately. Ability to follow event guidelines and enforce them throughout the event.
3. Flexibility: Willingness to work irregular hours, including weekends and evenings, to accommodate event schedules. Adaptability to handle unforeseen situations and changes during events.
4. Team Player: Collaborative attitude and ability to work effectively with the event management team and other staff members. Willingness to assist with tasks beyond the primary responsibilities during peak event periods.
application_instructions: Email Resume to Meg Peart at Director@valhallatahoe.com

title: Barista
description:
We’re looking for someone friendly, reliable, and quick on their feet to join our café team.

This job is about more than making coffee. It’s about taking care of people. You’ll be greeting guests, ringing orders, making drinks, keeping things clean, and helping the shift run smoothly. We move fast, especially in busy seasons, so you need to stay focused and calm under pressure.

If you like being productive, enjoy talking to people, and take pride in doing things well, you’ll fit in here.

title: Guest Room Attendant / Housekeeper
description: The Burks Companies is hiring full-time Guest Room Attendants/Housekeepers at a high-profile hotel facility. Team members clean guest rooms to the highest standards, reporting maintenance issues and replacing amenities while delivering friendly, professional service.

title: QA Inspector
description: The Burks Companies is hiring full-time Housekeeping Quality Assurance Inspectors. Inspectors review guest rooms after cleaning to verify they meet the highest cleanliness and presentation standards before guests check in.

title: EVS Attendant / Janitor
description: The Burks Companies is hiring full-time EVS Attendants/Janitors at a Tahoe-area facility. Team members maintain cleanliness in public areas, restrooms, and common spaces to ensure a welcoming and sanitary environment for all guests.

title: Houseman and Driver
description: A hybrid role responsible for both transportation and housekeeping support. Drivers run daily transportation routes while Housemen maintain floor supplies, collect linens, and respond to guest requests in support of the housekeeping department.

title: Seafood Team Memeber (Service Counter)
description: Provides support as a member of the seafood team to include duties related to counter service, stocking, and sanitation in the seafood department. All Whole Foods Market Retail jobs require ensuring a positive company image by providing courteous, friendly, and efficient service to customers and Team Members at all times. All positions must be performed in accordance with team and store Standard Operating Procedures. Further, Team Members must be prepared and able to perform the duties inherent in other Team Member job descriptions. All positions must strive to support WFM core values and goals, promote national, regional, and store programs and initiatives, and ensure adherence to all applicable health and safety regulations including Food Safety and regulatory duties required in the department.

title: Clerk
description:
We are now hiring Great People Who Care!

We are looking for a fearless and accountable Clerk who is positive and passionate! Our Clerks will be responsible for executing a wide variety of tasks throughout the store, including working throughout a variety of different apartments, and will provide a memorable experience to all our customers. A Clerk is a responsible team player and always ready to learn. A Clerk can work at a fast pace, has a keen eye for safety and will be able to help execute an assortment of duties throughout the store.

Be part of our store team and help us make a positive impact in our communities. We promise our Team Members open and honest communication and opportunities for growth with our company. Our leaders lead with passion and purpose, and celebrate you with meaningful recognition. We promote a healthy life balance because we believe your personal well-being is essential.

 We have a passion for food, and we share an inspiring vision, “To change the way the world eats, one plate at a time.”

This job remains posted year-round and may not reflect current hiring needs as we seek to have a talent pool to reach out to as needs arise. If interviews aren’t being scheduled at this time, we will keep your application on file for upcoming openings. For the latest information on available positions, please contact your nearest store directly.

title: Casino Beverage Stocker
description: Responsible for ensuring that adequate levels of all supplies (perishable and non-perishable) are maintained consistently (front and back) of beverage operations.  Also responsible for maintaining cleanliness and effectiveness of beverage storerooms and Easy Bar liquor system.

title: Cookie Crew
description:
Insomnia Cookies is one of the fastest growing, late-night, sweet indulgence companies in the country, and we are set to open our newest store in South Lake Tahoe later this year!  At the present time, we are actively interviewing Cookie Crew for our store located at 4125 Lake Tahoe Blvd, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150.
 
As a member of the Cookie Crew you are the ultimate Insomniac. Not only are you the point person at the front of the store for interacting with our customers, but you also get to bake all of our awesome Warm and Delicious cookies as well!

title: Vacation House Cleaner
description:
The house cleaner is responsible for cleaning vacation rentals throughout the service region (South Lake Tahoe).

VRA is a local, Tahoe born company. Our work environment is fast paced and result oriented with tremendous opportunity to learn new things, develop your resume, and turn a job into a career. Our focus is to provide awesome jobs which are flexible for you to enjoy Tahoe activities. We need quality people who are motivated in their career endeavors and want to be a part of a special team!

South Lake Tahoe, Stateline, Zephyr Cove, Carson City, Gardnerville / Minden residents welcome!

title: Bartender
description:
Join our vibrant hospitality team as a Bartender, where your energy and passion for exceptional service will create memorable experiences for our guests. In this dynamic role, you will craft and serve a variety of beverages, ensure customer satisfaction, and maintain a lively, welcoming atmosphere. Your expertise in food and beverage service, combined with your ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently, will be key to thriving in this fast-paced environment. Whether working in a fine dining setting, nightclub, or banquet hall, your enthusiasm and professionalism will shine through every interaction.

Submit your resume directly on the California Burger website.

title: Sandwich Artist/Cashier/Supervisor
description: We are seeking a dedicated and enthusiastic Sandwich Maker to join our team in a fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate will have a passion for food preparation and customer service, ensuring that each sandwich is crafted to perfection while maintaining high standards of cleanliness and food safety. This role requires effective time management skills and the ability to work collaboratively within a team.

title: Retail Attendant
description: As a Retail Attendant at Edgewood Tahoe Resort, you will provide an exceptional shopping experience for our guests by delivering top-tier customer service, maintaining an upscale retail environment, and assisting with sales of luxury products. You will act as a brand ambassador, ensuring that each guest enjoys a seamless and memorable shopping experience.

title: Server
description: As a Restaurant Server at Edgewood Tahoe Resort, you will provide an exceptional dining experience for our esteemed guests, delivering impeccable service with attention to detail. You will be responsible for taking orders, serving food and beverages, and ensuring a seamless and memorable experience that reflects the highest standards of luxury hospitality.

title: Busser / Food Runner
description: The Busser/Food Runner is responsible for maintaining a clean and organized dining area, assisting servers with various tasks, and delivering food from the kitchen to customers. This role ensures guests receive exceptional dining experience by helping to keep the restaurant running smoothly, efficiently, and with excellent customer service.

title: Sales Associate
description: Sales Associate will be responsible for facilitating day-to-day operations at our Clearly Tahoe shop. Sales Associate will be responsible for maintaining a clean and presentable shop appearance, organizing and ensuring products are properly displayed, labeled and free of damage or defects. Sales Associate will be responsible for communicating with pre-scheduled tour guests prior to arrival, facilitating check-in and outfitting guests upon arrival. Sales Associate will be responsible for communicating and relaying information between various department. Sales Associate will be responsible for answering the phone and occasional emails. Sales Associate should be knowledgeable of the company and prepared to assist guests with questions, recommendations and basic reservations on-site. Sales Associate will be responsible for receiving packages and ensuring the products are free to damage or defects, invoicing deliveries and helping to enter new merchandise into Square. Sales Associate will be responsible for running daily inventory checks and recording any lost, stolen or damaged items. Sales Associate will be responsible for assisting guests with basic sales in the shop as well as online orders. Sales Associate will be responsible for handling money and submitting daily reports and cash drops with accuracy.

title: Multiple Positions Available (Seasonal)
description: Multiple seasonal positions available in housekeeping, restaurant, retail, cafe, lodging, shuttles, and more available! Most roles are seasonal from April/May through October/November.

title: Maintenance Technician II - Recreation (Seasonal/Temporary)
description: The City of South Lake Tahoe is recruiting for Maintenance Technician II positions at the NEW Recreation and Aquatics Center. This position plays a key role in supporting daily operations, program set ups, equipment movement, and maintenance to ensure spaces are safe, clean, functional, and ready for public before, during, and after events. This position coordinates with recreation staff, event organizers, and program instructors to meet setup timelines and needs.  Duties include setting up and breaking down chairs, tables, stages, and equipment for various events, rentals, and programs. In addition, this position provides on-site support during events to assist with unexpected needs, layout changes, and minor adjustments.  Hours vary based on event scheduling and include evenings and week-end shifts.

title: Shift Lead
description:
We’re looking for a lead to join our team. This person will work front and back of house, and specialize in an aspect of the business.

This full time position includes a benefits package.

title: Barista/Register/Back of House
description:
Train in Cuppa Tahoe front, back, & barista services with associated pay increases
Client interaction
Talk “books” with clientele
Food & beverage preparation
Cashier responsibilities
Social media participation

title: Night Cleaner
description:
Clean the front and back of house
Focus on deep cleaning different areas of the store
This is done during the hours that we’re closed, and has no customer interaction.

title: Grocery Clerk- Freight
description: Job Summary: Receiving, Breaking Down, Stocking, Rotating, Merchandising, Facing & Presentation Perfection in all of Grocery Department.

title: Produce Clerk
description: Job Summary: To Provide World Famous Friendly Customer Service to Customers, Team Members & Outside Vendors. Merchandising, Filling, Stocking, Breaking Down & Storing Loads, Culling Product, Rotating Product, Preparation of Product, Trimming, Crisping etc..

title: Meat Clerk
description: To Provide World Famous Friendly Customer Service to Customers, Team Members & Outside Vendors. Meat Processing, Wrapping, Pricing, Merchandising, Cleaning, Sanitation, Stocking Deli, Receiving Product, Tracking Invoicing, Maintaining Accurate Inventories.

title: Grocery Clerk
description: To Provide World Famous Friendly Customer Service to Customers, Team Members & Outside Vendors.  Merchandising, Stocking, Rotating Product, Facing, Cashier, Bagging, and Cleaning,

title: Crew Member
description: No Description
